steps.title: Test the likely point
steps.content:
Check the point $(2,-1)$ in both inequalities.
$$-1\le 3(2)+1$$
$$-1\le 7$$
$$2-(-1)>1$$
$$3>1$$
Both inequalities are true.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two inequalities, then plot the four choices. The solution must be in the overlap of the shaded regions. The answer is D.
